allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('description:', d.get\('description',''\)\); print\('main:', d.get\('main',''\)\); print\('exports keys:', list\(\(d.get\('exports'\) or {}\).keys\(\)\)[:10]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:d[k] for k in ['main','exports','bin'] if k in d}, indent=2\)\)")
